violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the deli counter area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Bread sticks, bread, and rolls packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food items were taken off the shelf and must not be sold until labels with the required information are placed on the food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
